codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Что-то пошло не так. Please try again shortly.

codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.

codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not Сохранить your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment и try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An Ошибка occurred while Загрузка this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid Эл. почта или Пароль. Please check your details и try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please Выбрать a tenant.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Войти again к Продолжить.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This Эл. почта is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid или expired
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: Не удалось сохранить admission record. Проверьте подключение и повторите попытку
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some обязательно admission details are missing. Please Проверка highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable к generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still Проверка и Сохранить admission.

codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: Не удалось сохранить local admission draft. Please try again

privacy.title: Конфиденциальность
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences и session data are stored only on this device. Нетthing is sent к external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If Онлайн AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent к configured services.

about.title: О программе
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype для reference и training. Нетt для clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support и advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, или determine Аппарат ИВЛ Настройки.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against Пациент, your Учреждение workflow, и local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Обязательно before continuing к clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device и will be Синхронизировано when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Проверка safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data и uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible для Пациент care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in Учреждение context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active Учреждение и Роль shown by your session. Keep records within correct Учреждение workflow и follow local escalation, Проверка, и approval procedures.

inputs.title: Введитеing inputs
inputs.body: Use Принять к Введите available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Необязательно ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing Необязательно data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a Сохранить blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations Показать advisory Аппарат ИВЛ setting references с a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align с your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only и verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Мониторинг и alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a Рекомендация, use Мониторинг к log vitals и labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds и should be assessed according к local protocol.

offline.title: Офлайн behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Принять, advisory summaries, Мониторинг) works Офлайн. Data is saved locally. Необязательно AI features require connectivity. When Назад Онлайн, Продолжить as Норма.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume и oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory к expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Дыхательный объем (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, и pH, tied к a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance и verification state для a reference range. Only active approved или verified ranges are eligible для active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need Проверка before dataset или training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue для Проверка decisions, corrections, exclusions, и audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current Офлайн, Онлайн, или syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden из Норма clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; Введите SpO₂ и Другое vitals when available. для better matching, Добавить PaO₂, PaCO₂, и pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app Офлайн
offline.body: Принять, advisory summaries, и Мониторинг work Офлайн. Data is stored locally. Необязательно AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not обязательно для core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, Ожидание, retired, rejected, и unverified ranges are not eligible для active decision-support display. Проверка source, version, scope, и verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness Помощь is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness и shadow-mode details are visible only к approved governance roles. Нетrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs Проверка
needsReview.body: Use Проверка queue к check submitted data, request correction, Одобрить eligible records, или Исключить records с an audit Причина.

guides.home: Проверка Учреждение context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, и records needing Проверка before opening a Пациент workflow.
guides.admit: Capture Пациент pathway и available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly и Проверка backend-confirmed calculations after Сохранить.
guides.tracking: Use Отслеживание к scan recent ventilation status и Проверка needs. Read trend flags с source data и local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture для de-identified candidate records. Human Проверка is обязательно before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use Проверка queue к Одобрить, request correction, или Исключить records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards для aggregate quality, Проверка, reference, и governance status. Avoid Пациент identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use Настройки для Учетная запись, Учреждение, accessibility, Конфиденциальность, sync, и reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Проверка FiO₂ и PEEP; consider recruitment; check для shunt или V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Проверка minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation и perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols и clinical judgment.

ai.label: Поддержка решений ИИ
ai.enableHint: Use Онлайн AI для complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, и uncertain values. Аппарат ИВЛ Настройки are suggested on Далее step из dataset.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single Имя–value pair. Необязательно; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Имя

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs или Другое metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used для trend analysis и Мониторинг after you start session. Необязательно; you can Добавить points later on Мониторинг screen.
